ingredients_text_en_ocr_1662481657: gullon gluten free oats , choco chips gluten free cookie with chocolate pieces suitable for people with gluten allergy ingredients: cornstarch, chocolate pieces 17% (sugar, cocoa mass, cocoa butter, emulsifier (soy lecithins)), rice flour, vegetable oil (sunflower oil with high fatty acid content) 14%, oat flakes 13%, sugar, oligofructose, polydextrose, rice starch, salt, leavening agents (sodium- hydrogen carbonate, ammonium hydrogen carbonate), aroma, natural flavoring, emulsifier (soy lecithins), may contain  traces of milk and nuts, store dry, not too hot and protected from direct sunlight, best before: see date on the back, net weight: 220g e produced by galletas gullón sa - www,gullon,es الصودیم که یونات حمض الأمونيوم) ، نكهة اصطناعية nutrient content per 100g 1938 kj/
ingredients_text_en_ocr_1662481657_resul: gullon gluten free oats , choco chips gluten free cookie with chocolate pieces suitable for people with gluten allergy ingredients: cornstarch, chocolate pieces 17% (sugar, cocoa mass, cocoa butter, emulsifier (soy lecithins)), rice flour, vegetable oil (sunflower oil with high fatty acid content) 14%, oat flakes 13%, sugar, oligofructose, polydextrose, rice starch, salt, leavening agents (sodium - hydrogen carbonate, ammonium hydrogen carbonate), aroma, natural flavoring, emulsifier (soy lecithins), may contain  traces of milk and nuts, store dry, not too hot and protected from direct sunlight, best before: see date on the back, net weight: 220g e produced by galletas gullón sa - www,gullon,es الصودیم که یونات حمض الأمونيوم) ، نكهة اصطناعية nutrient content per 100g 1938 kj/
ingredients_text_es: Harina de arroz, almidón de maíz, chips de chocolate 17% (azúcar, pasta de sodio, carbonato ácido de amonio), aroma, emulgente (lecitina de SOJA), aroma natural. Puede contener trazas de leche. Sin trigo. Sin huevo. Sin frutos de cáscara. Alto en fibra.
ingredients_text_fr: Farine de riz, amidon de maïs, pépites de chocolat 17% (sucre, pâte de cacao, beurre de cacao, émulsifiant (lécithine de SOJA)), huile végétale (huile de tournesol oléique) 14%, flocons d'AVOINE 13%, sucre, oligofructose, polydextrose, amidon de riz, sel, poudres à lever (carbonate acide de sodium, carbonate acide d'ammonium), arôme, émulsifiant (lécithine de SOJA), arôme naturel. Il peut contenir des traces de lait. Sans blé. Sans oeufs. Sans fruits à coque. Riche en fibres.
ingredients_text_hr: Kukuruzni škrob, komadići čokolade 17 % (šećer, kakaova masa, kakaov maslac, emulgator: lecitini (SOJA)), rižino brašno, biljno ulje (suncokretovo ulje s visokim sadržajem oleinske kiseline) 14 %, ZOBENE pahuljice 13 %, šećer, oligofruktoza, polidekstroza, rižin škrob, sol, tvari za rahljenje (natrijevi karbonati, amonijevi karbonati), aroma, prirodna aroma, emulgator: lecitini (SOJA).Može sadržavati tragove MLIJEKA I ORAŠASTOG VOĆA.
ingredients_text_it: Farina di riso, amido di mais, gocce di cioccolato 17% (zucchero, pasta di cacao, burro di cacao, emulsionante (lecitina di SOIA)), olio vegetale (olio di girasole altamente oleico) 14%, fiocchi d'AVENA 13%, zucchero, oligofruttosio, polidestrosio, amido di riso, sale, agenti lievitanti (carbonato acido di sodio, carbonato acido di ammonio), aroma, emulsionante (lecitina di SOIA), aroma naturale. Può contenere tracce di latte. Senza frumento. Senza uovo. Senza frutta a guscio. Ad alto contenuto di fibre.
